settings.title: 🧬 Who Are We?
settings.text: We’re a global T-shirt company with over 15 years of experience and our own manufacturing in China. Trusted worldwide, we turn ideas into quality apparel.

settings.title: 💸 How Can I Earn Money?
settings.text:
Every time you publish your T-shirt design and someone buys it, you get rewarded.
Currently, we offer flexible and secure payment methods:

  • PayPal – fast and safe money transfer worldwide.
  • Amazon Gift Cards – perfect if you prefer shopping credits.

👉 Our team will notify you as soon as your T-shirt earns money, and we’ll reach out to arrange the best payout method for you

settings.title: 🚫 Do I Need to Pay or Subscribe?
settings.text: No payment, no subscription. Just design and publish your T-shirt. If no one buys it, that’s it — no risk. (Note: There’s a limit to how many designs you can create.)
Have questions or need support? Just reach out via chat or email us at support@kurageai.com — we're always happy to help!
